'''Koobis "Target" Nu''' was a young [[Rodian/Legends|Rodian]] male who flew as Rogue Eight in [[Rogue Squadron/Legends|Rogue Squadron]] during the campaign against [[Warlord/Legends|Warlord]] [[Zsinj]].<ref name="Solo Command" />

{{Char-stub}}
